reason: The prompt cleanly targets the judgment that valve-opening temperature is an initiation/venting indicator, whereas toxic hazard separation at high SOC is governed by runaway-driven gas composition/concentration and the integrated FED metric, with CO explicitly singled out by lethal-threshold framing. It has strong discriminative power against the common overreach of equating earlier venting with higher toxicity, though the short-answer format can invite multi-parameter discussion (CO vs FED) that slightly weakens single-fault purity and increases grading latitude.
